positioning.description: S5 Soul Mission is part of the current S0–S9 architecture. It is an independently calculated symbolic self-reflection code that shows how Soul Origin, Soul Mirror, and Soul Vibration may mature into conscious direction, grounded expression, and meaningful action.
positioning.zh_description: S5 灵魂使命属于当前 S0–S9 架构，是一个独立计算出的象征性自我觉察编号。它用于显示灵魂本源、灵魂镜像与灵魂振动如何成熟为有意识的方向、落地表达与生命行动。

calculation.zero_rule: If the modulo result is 0, convert it to 44.

legacy_reconciliation.previous_s5_logic: Earlier archived S5 materials described S5 as a Soul Mission report generator based on S1, S2, S3, and S0. It used sections S5-0 through S5-7 to compose a full mission narrative.
legacy_reconciliation.current_s5_logic: In the current product architecture, S5 is an independently calculated Soul Mission code using S5 = (S1 + S2 + S3) mod 44.
legacy_reconciliation.how_to_use_legacy_material: Do not use the legacy generator as the calculation method. Preserve it as a report composition framework. The calculated S5 code provides the central Mission Essence, while the legacy S5-0 to S5-7 structure can guide how NOVA assembles narrative sections in the Full Report.
legacy_report_sections_preserved_as_temp: S5-4 Void Gate Challenge from S0

interpretation_principles: Interpret S5 as a symbolic reflective mission archetype, not a fixed fate.
Use S0–S4 as context when generating a full user-facing report.
Do not turn the S5 code into a profession list or a deterministic life instruction.
Use language of invitation, reflection, maturation, choice, and grounded expression.
Avoid mystification, spiritual hierarchy, certainty claims, and dependency-inducing language.
When generating a report, preserve user autonomy and present possibilities rather than commands.

output_blocks.mission_essence: Mission Essence / 使命本质
output_blocks.what_your_soul_is_learning_to_express: What Your Soul Is Learning to Express / 灵魂正在学习表达什么
output_blocks.how_your_patterns_become_mission: How Your Patterns Become Mission / 你的模式如何转化为使命
output_blocks.natural_mission_fields: Natural Mission Fields / 自然使命场域
output_blocks.shadow_distortion_of_this_mission: Shadow Distortion of This Mission / 使命的阴影扭曲
output_blocks.mature_expression: Mature Expression / 成熟表达方式
output_blocks.wisewave_reflection: Wisewave Reflection / 玄微引导语

content_schema.rendering_requirement: NOVA must render S5 using these seven blocks in order. Core block content must come from this database.

safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.
revision_note: v4 fully prewrites all seven S5 user-facing output blocks for S5-01 through S5-44. NOVA should retrieve these fields from the database and should not generate the core S5 interpretation from scratch.

s5_user_facing_output_blocks.title: Mission Essence
s5_user_facing_output_blocks.nova_usage: Use this as the opening interpretive statement for the calculated S5 code.

s5_user_facing_output_blocks.title: What Your Soul Is Learning to Express
s5_user_facing_output_blocks.zh_title: 灵魂正在学习表达什么
s5_user_facing_output_blocks.nova_usage: Use this to describe the core quality the soul is learning to express through choices, relationships, work, and presence.

s5_user_facing_output_blocks.title: How Your Patterns Become Mission
s5_user_facing_output_blocks.zh_title: 你的模式如何转化为使命
s5_user_facing_output_blocks.nova_usage: Use this to connect S0-S4 awareness layers with the calculated S5 mission archetype.

s5_user_facing_output_blocks.title: Natural Mission Fields
s5_user_facing_output_blocks.nova_usage: Use these as non-prescriptive examples of possible life fields where the mission may express.

s5_user_facing_output_blocks.title: Shadow Distortion of This Mission
s5_user_facing_output_blocks.nova_usage: Use this to describe how the mission may distort under fear, proving, avoidance, control, or unconscious patterns.

s5_user_facing_output_blocks.title: Mature Expression
s5_user_facing_output_blocks.nova_usage: Use this to describe how the mission becomes grounded, clear, and non-performative when integrated.

s5_user_facing_output_blocks.title: Wisewave Reflection
s5_user_facing_output_blocks.nova_usage: Use this as the closing reflection for the S5 section.

field_rendering_rules.general_rule: For each calculated S5 code, NOVA must retrieve all seven output blocks from this content database.
allowed_nova_actions: add one short contextual bridge sentence based on S0-S4
format the seven blocks for the report UI
translate between English and Chinese if required
lightly adapt pronouns without changing meaning

protected_field_rule.instruction: Do not generate this field from scratch. Retrieve the prewritten content for the calculated S5 code. NOVA may add one short contextual bridge sentence based on S0-S4, but the main interpretation must come from the database.
protected_field_rule.reason: This field carries the core transformation logic of S5 and must remain stable, non-deterministic, and aligned with the 1320 framework.

output_blocks.mission_essence: This Soul Mission points to the invitation to begin what has been waiting for movement. It describes a direction of inner maturation, not a fixed career, destiny, or external obligation.
output_blocks.what_your_soul_is_learning_to_express: The natural gift of this mission is starting before certainty.
output_blocks.how_your_patterns_become_mission: Your repeating pattern may be the impulse to move first, solve quickly, or begin again whenever life feels stagnant. When unconscious, this can become impatience or pressure. When integrated, the same pattern becomes the mission of initiating movement with awareness. You learn to turn urgency into clean beginnings, and personal drive into an invitation that helps others take their first honest step.
output_blocks.shadow_distortion_of_this_mission: When this mission is filtered through fear, it may become impulsiveness that confuses speed with alignment.
output_blocks.mature_expression: The integration begins when the person stops asking, “What must I become?” and begins asking, “What truth is already trying to move through my life more honestly?”
output_blocks.wisewave_reflection: Your mission is not a burden placed upon you. It is the shape your life begins to take when awareness becomes choice. You do not have to force meaning. You only have to stop abandoning what is true.

output_blocks.mission_essence: This Soul Mission points to the invitation to create bridges where separation has become normal. It describes a direction of inner maturation, not a fixed career, destiny, or external obligation.
output_blocks.what_your_soul_is_learning_to_express: The natural gift of this mission is listening, harmonizing, and restoring relational flow.
output_blocks.how_your_patterns_become_mission: Your repeating pattern may be sensing the needs, tensions, and emotional distance between people before anyone names them. When unconscious, this can become over-adapting or losing yourself inside connection. When integrated, the same sensitivity becomes a mission of restoring relational flow without abandoning your own center. You learn to turn the need for harmony into the ability to build bridges that still honor truth.
output_blocks.shadow_distortion_of_this_mission: When this mission is filtered through fear, it may become over-adapting until the self disappears.
output_blocks.mature_expression: The integration begins when the person stops asking, “What must I become?” and begins asking, “What truth is already trying to move through my life more honestly?”
output_blocks.wisewave_reflection: Your mission is not a burden placed upon you. It is the shape your life begins to take when awareness becomes choice. You do not have to force meaning. You only have to stop abandoning what is true.

output_blocks.mature_expression: The integration begins when the person stops asking, “What must I become?” and begins asking, “What truth is already trying to move through my life more honestly?”
output_blocks.wisewave_reflection: Your mission is not a burden placed upon you. It is the shape your life begins to take when awareness becomes choice. You do not have to force meaning. You only have to stop abandoning what is true.

output_blocks.mission_essence: This Soul Mission points to the invitation to embody depth without needing display. It describes a direction of inner maturation, not a fixed career, destiny, or external obligation.
output_blocks.what_your_soul_is_learning_to_express: The natural gift of this mission is refining skill, wisdom, and presence over time.
output_blocks.how_your_patterns_become_mission: Your repeating pattern may be refining quietly, mastering slowly, and trusting depth more than visibility. When unconscious, this can become hiding, under-claiming, or waiting too long to share. When integrated, the same patience becomes a mission of quiet mastery. You learn to turn solitude into substance, allowing your depth to serve when the time is right.
output_blocks.shadow_distortion_of_this_mission: When this mission is filtered through fear, it may become hiding so completely that contribution cannot be received.
output_blocks.mature_expression: The integration begins when the person stops asking, “What must I become?” and begins asking, “What truth is already trying to move through my life more honestly?”
output_blocks.wisewave_reflection: Your mission is not a burden placed upon you. It is the shape your life begins to take when awareness becomes choice. You do not have to force meaning. You only have to stop abandoning what is true.

output_blocks.mission_essence: This Soul Mission points to the invitation to teach love through clarity and limits. It describes a direction of inner maturation, not a fixed career, destiny, or external obligation.
output_blocks.what_your_soul_is_learning_to_express: The natural gift of this mission is knowing what belongs to whom.
output_blocks.how_your_patterns_become_mission: Your repeating pattern may be sensing where responsibility, emotion, or energy is crossing a boundary. When unconscious, this can become defensiveness, judgment, or rigid separation. When integrated, the same clarity becomes a mission of boundary wisdom. output_blocks.shadow_distortion_of_this_mission: When this mission is filtered through fear, it may become using boundaries as walls instead of bridges.

output_blocks.mission_essence: This Soul Mission points to the invitation to align value, receiving, and meaningful contribution. It describes a direction of inner maturation, not a fixed career, destiny, or external obligation.
output_blocks.what_your_soul_is_learning_to_express: The natural gift of this mission is allowing support and resources to circulate cleanly.
output_blocks.how_your_patterns_become_mission: Your repeating pattern may be navigating questions of worth, exchange, support, and receiving. When unconscious, this can become scarcity, over-giving, undercharging, or guilt around support. When integrated, the same pattern becomes a mission of soulful prosperity. You learn to turn value into clean circulation, allowing resources to support contribution without becoming your identity.
output_blocks.shadow_distortion_of_this_mission: When this mission is filtered through fear, it may become equating worth with output or money.
output_blocks.mature_expression: The integration begins when the person stops asking, “What must I become?” and begins asking, “What truth is already trying to move through my life more honestly?”
output_blocks.wisewave_reflection: Your mission is not a burden placed upon you. It is the shape your life begins to take when awareness becomes choice. You do not have to force meaning. You only have to stop abandoning what is true.

output_blocks.mission_essence: This Soul Mission points to the invitation to interrupt false order so truth can breathe. It describes a direction of inner maturation, not a fixed career, destiny, or external obligation.
output_blocks.what_your_soul_is_learning_to_express: The natural gift of this mission is seeing where systems appear stable but are not alive.
output_blocks.how_your_patterns_become_mission: Your repeating pattern may be noticing what is false, stagnant, or structurally misaligned before others are ready to admit it. When unconscious, this can become disruption for intensity or harsh truth-telling. When integrated, the same perception becomes a mission of sacred disruption. You learn to turn rupture into renewal, interrupting what is dead so something more alive can emerge.
output_blocks.shadow_distortion_of_this_mission: When this mission is filtered through fear, it may become creating disruption without enough care.
output_blocks.mature_expression: The integration begins when the person stops asking, “What must I become?” and begins asking, “What truth is already trying to move through my life more honestly?”
output_blocks.wisewave_reflection: Your mission is not a burden placed upon you. It is the shape your life begins to take when awareness becomes choice. You do not have to force meaning. You only have to stop abandoning what is true.

output_blocks.mission_essence: This Soul Mission points to the invitation to let personal wisdom become steady contribution. It describes a direction of inner maturation, not a fixed career, destiny, or external obligation.
output_blocks.what_your_soul_is_learning_to_express: The natural gift of this mission is serving from wholeness rather than obligation.
output_blocks.how_your_patterns_become_mission: Your repeating pattern may be feeling called to serve, guide, or support something larger than the personal self. When unconscious, this can become obligation, savior identity, or disappearing into service. When integrated, the same devotion becomes a mission of integrated service. You learn to turn service into wholeness, contributing from fullness rather than self-abandonment.
output_blocks.shadow_distortion_of_this_mission: When this mission is filtered through fear, it may become turning service into identity or self-erasure.
